rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0002
rows.name:
Let's hurry. We need to get inside
before the enemy breaks in.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0004
rows.name: Here... Our bodies are here, aren't they?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Notification from the Central
Life Control System.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Remaining system energy has
dropped below zero point two.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0007
rows.name:
One thousand seconds until
defensive field collapse.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0009
rows.name: It will only last fifteen minutes![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0010
rows.name:
In any case, if the energy runs out, it won't
matter even if the field itself remains.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0011
rows.name: If we activate the backup system[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0012
rows.name:
The operational limit will be extended, and
the defensive field can be maintained too.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0013
rows.name: If we can maintain the defensive field[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0014
rows.name:
We may be able to force the enemy to
retreat once their supplies run low.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12050100_MSG0015
rows.name:
Exactly. Everything depends on whether
we can secure the backup system.[ST:wait ]
